title: Security
description: Manage password changes, reset email delivery, and destructive account actions in one place.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Update your password without leaving the current session.

messages.passwordMismatch: The two new password fields do not match.
messages.updateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.

reset_password_request.title: Reset Password
reset_password_request.description: Send a reset email to the address tied to your account.
reset_password_request.tip: Use this when you want a signed email link instead of changing the password in-place.
reset_password_request.sent_hint: If the address is valid, a reset email is on the way.

messages.sent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
messages.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

reset_password_confirm.title: Choose a New Password
reset_password_confirm.description: Set a new password for your account and get back into your workspace.

messages.tokenMissing: This reset link is incomplete. Request a new one.
messages.passwordMismatch: The two new password fields do not match.
messages.updated: Password reset successful. Redirecting you now.
messages.updateFailed: Failed to reset password. Request a fresh email and try again.
messages.invalidOrExpiredLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a fresh email to continue.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
danger_zone.confirmDescription: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
danger_zone.warningMessage: All your credits, payment history, generated content, and personal data will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible and cannot be recovered.
danger_zone.deleteError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
